summary: CRITICAL: MatrixGenerator.Tests.ps1 (required by task and workflow) is missing entirely—the deliverable is incomplete. The task explicitly demands red/green TDD with Pester tests; this cannot be evaluated. Workflow references non-existent Docker image `act-ubuntu-pwsh:latest` (line 73 of run-tests.sh); standard act ubuntu runner won't have it. PowerShell script itself is well-structured with proper param validation and error handling. Workflow steps ~70–180 repeat the same test pattern (config → New-EnvironmentMatrix → count check) and could be consolidated or moved into the missing test file. Step 'Test output artifact' (last step) adds no value. Without the test file, half the deliverable is gone.
